controls.control_objective: To ensure have ramifications for a range of other risk categories too
controls.control_description:
If not managed effectively, credit risk may have ramifications for a range of other risk
categories too.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have ramifications for a range of other risk categories too

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - credit risk management) directions, 2025 2
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025
2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - credit risk management) directions, 2025 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean all fund-based and non-fund-based exposures
controls.control_description:
(1) In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires,
<image>
Explanation: Exposure shall mean all fund-based and non-fund-based exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean all fund-based and non-fund-based exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a 'person' other than an individual and a hindu undivided family (huf)
controls.control_description:
5[(iiia) 'Entity' in the context of a 'related party' prescribed in Chapter IIIA of these
Directions shall mean a 'person' other than an individual and a Hindu Undivided
Family (HUF).]
Note: For the purpose of assessing the effectiveness of hedge, guidance may be
taken from the applicable accounting standards and the relevant guidance notes of
the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India on the matter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a 'person' other than an individual and a hindu undivided family (huf)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as naturally hedged only if the offsetting exposure has the maturity / cash flow within the same accounting year
controls.control_description:
Explanation: An exposure shall be considered as naturally hedged only if the
offsetting exposure has the maturity / cash flow within the same accounting year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as naturally hedged only if the offsetting exposure has the maturity / cash flow within the same accounting year

controls.control_objective: To ensure offset the exchange risk arising out of repayment obligations of an external commercial borrowing if both the exposures have cash flows / maturity wit
controls.control_description:
For instance, export revenues (booked as receivable) may offset the exchange risk
arising out of repayment obligations of an external commercial borrowing if both
the exposures have cash flows / maturity within the same accounting year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offset the exchange risk arising out of repayment obligations of an external commercial borrowing if both the exposures have cash flows / maturity wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean financial and performance guarantees issued by banks on behalf of their clients
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Bank Guarantee' shall mean financial and performance guarantees issued by
banks on behalf of their clients.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean financial and performance guarantees issued by banks on behalf of their clients

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean negotiable instruments that give the holder the right to receive stated fixed sums on demand or at a fixed or determinable future time
controls.control_description:
(ii) 'Bills Purchased and Discounted' shall mean negotiable instruments that give the
holder the right to receive stated fixed sums on demand or at a fixed or
determinable future time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean negotiable instruments that give the holder the right to receive stated fixed sums on demand or at a fixed or determinable future time

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an advance up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, b
controls.control_description:
1[(iia) 'Cash credit (CC)' shall mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an
advance up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge
of goods, book debts, standing crops, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an advance up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, b

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a committee of the board of the bank entrusted with sanctioning of loans to related parties
controls.control_description:
The outstanding amount is repayable on demand.]
2[(iiaa) 'Committee on lending to related parties' shall mean a committee of the Board
of the bank entrusted with sanctioning of loans to related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a committee of the board of the bank entrusted with sanctioning of loans to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also identify any existing committee, other than the audit committee, for this purpose
controls.control_description:
Banks may also
identify any existing Committee, other than the Audit Committee, for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also identify any existing committee, other than the audit committee, for this purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as specified in section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
<image>
(iiab) 'Contract or arrangement' shall have the same meaning as specified in Section
188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013.]
(iiac) 'Control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of
the Companies Act, 2013.]
3[(iib) 'Current Account' shall mean a form of demand deposit account wherefrom
withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in the
account or up to a particular agreed amount and shall also be deemed to include
other deposit accounts which are neither Savings nor Term deposit account.]
4[(iic) 'Director of a bank' shall have the same meaning as defined in Explanation (b)
to Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act 1949 and would include a nominee
director and an independent director.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as specified in section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a counterparty to which a bank has exposure in any currency
controls.control_description:
(iii) 'Entity' in the context of 'Unhedged Foreign Currency Exposure' prescribed in
Chapter-IV of these Directions shall mean a counterparty to which a bank has
exposure in any currency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a counterparty to which a bank has exposure in any currency

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on credit risk management
controls.control_description:
9[A bank shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk
Management.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on credit risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure , inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related parties, unhedged foreign currency exposures and valuation of properties including empanelme
controls.control_description:
The policy shall, inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related
parties, unhedged foreign currency exposures and valuation of properties
including empanelment of valuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related parties, unhedged foreign currency exposures and valuation of properties including empanelme

controls.control_objective: To ensure suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events
controls.control_description:
Credit assessments carried out by a bank shall suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events.]
10 Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Credit Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events

controls.control_objective: To ensure from entering into any commitment for granting any loans or advances to or on behalf of any of its directors, or any firm in which any of its director
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 20(1)(b) of the BR Act, 1949, a bank is prohibited from entering
into any commitment for granting any loans or advances to or on behalf of any of
its directors, or any firm in which any of its directors is interested as partner,
manager, employee or guarantor, or any company [not being a subsidiary of the
banking company or a company registered under Section 8 of the Companies Act,
2013, or a Government company] of which, or the subsidiary or the holding
company of which any of the directors of the bank is a director, managing agent,
manager, employee or guarantor or in which they hold substantial interest, or any
individual in respect of whom any of its directors is a partner or guarantor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from entering into any commitment for granting any loans or advances to or on behalf of any of its directors, or any firm in which any of its director

controls.control_objective: To ensure further renew such a facility on or after its contracted 11deleted with effect from april 01, 2026 vide reserve bank of india (local area banks - cred
controls.control_description:
Provided that, till the director relinquishes the directorship of either the bank or the
company, the bank shall not further renew such a facility on or after its contracted
11Deleted with effect from April 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Credit Risk Management) - Amendment Directions, 2026 dated January 05, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to further renew such a facility on or after its contracted 11deleted with effect from april 01, 2026 vide reserve bank of india (local area banks - cred

controls.control_objective: To ensure be lower than the rate charged to the employees
controls.control_description:
The interest rate charged on all such loans shall not
be lower than the rate charged to the employees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be lower than the rate charged to the employees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or higher value
controls.control_description:
(v) Non-Fund Based (NFB) facility on behalf of a director or his / her related party,
provided that all such facilities shall be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent
or higher value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or higher value

controls.control_objective: To ensure , cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on account of derivative transactions
controls.control_description:
Provided that, cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on
account of derivative transactions.]
13[B.1 *****
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on account of derivative transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be void and of no effect
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 20A(2) of the Act ibid, any remission made in contravention of
the provisions of sub-section (1) above shall be void and of no effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be void and of no effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly observed
controls.control_description:
While granting loans and advances against shares, statutory provisions contained
in Sections 19(2) and 19(3) of the BR Act, 1949 shall be strictly observed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly observed

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide loans to companies for buy-back of shares / securities
controls.control_description:
Therefore, a bank shall
not provide loans to companies for buy-back of shares / securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide loans to companies for buy-back of shares / securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b
controls.control_description:
The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms
are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties by the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a bank, as required in terms of the
extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties'
in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties
controls.control_description:
The policy shall prescribe, inter
alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related
parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives
controls.control_description:
The policy shall also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of
the bank and their relatives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure , as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , as a part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties
controls.control_description: The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties
controls.control_description:
Within this
aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group
of related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential exposure limits
prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to grant of loans and advances to spouse and minor / dependent children of the directors of banks
controls.control_description:
Provisions of paragraph 7 in Chapter III shall also apply to grant of loans and
advances to spouse and minor / dependent children of the directors of banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to grant of loans and advances to spouse and minor / dependent children of the directors of banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant loan or advance to or on behalf of spouses of their directors in cases where the spouse has his / her own independent source of income arising o
controls.control_description:
However, banks may grant loan or advance to or on behalf of spouses of their directors
in cases where the spouse has his / her own independent source of income arising
out of his / her employment or profession and the facility so granted is based on
standard procedures and norms for assessing the creditworthiness of the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant loan or advance to or on behalf of spouses of their directors in cases where the spouse has his / her own independent source of income arising o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended on commercial terms, conforming to arms-length principle
controls.control_description:
Such facility should be extended on commercial terms, conforming to arms-length
principle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended on commercial terms, conforming to arms-length principle

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any exposure (including investments in the equity / debt capital instruments) to its promoters and their relatives
controls.control_description:
In addition to the restrictions placed on loans and advances by a bank to its directors
and the companies in which its directors are interested under Section 20 of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949, a bank shall not have any exposure (including
investments in the equity / debt capital instruments) to its promoters and their relatives;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any exposure (including investments in the equity / debt capital instruments) to its promoters and their relatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than ₹10 lakh
controls.control_description:
Loans to related parties, which are not prohibited in terms of provisions of Chapter III
or this Chapter of these Directions, or which have been permitted under power
exercised by the Reserve Bank under clause (a) of the Explanation under sub-section
4 of Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, except (i) credit facilities fully
secured by cash or liquid securities and in accordance to prescribed LTV and
valuation norms for such securities, and (ii) interbank loans, shall be subject to a
materiality threshold as per the credit policy, which shall not be higher than ₹10 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than ₹10 lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary for different categories of loans to related parties as per the bank's policy
controls.control_description:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loans to related parties as
per the bank's policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to vary for different categories of loans to related parties as per the bank's policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned either by the board or by the 'committee on lending to related parties' of the bank
controls.control_description:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned either by the
Board or by the 'Committee on Lending to Related Parties' of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned either by the board or by the 'committee on lending to related parties' of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties
controls.control_description:
Directors, KMP, or 'specified employees' shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves
or their related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one- time settlements, wr
controls.control_description:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations and decisions
relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-
time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security, implementation of
resolution plans, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one- time settlements, wr

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well as
the loans sanctioned by the bank to such related persons and related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
Credit facilities sanctioned to 'specified employees' and their relatives shall be
reported to the Board on an annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re
controls.control_description:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to
related parties are being adhered to or not.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the audit committee of the board
controls.control_description:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
therefor such deviations shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the audit committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure always be treated as lending to related party
controls.control_description:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the bank or by the supervisory
authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending to related
party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to always be treated as lending to related party

controls.control_objective: To ensure result in supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in
supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to result in supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r
controls.control_description:
These actions may include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full
provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and
restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed fit.]
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess and monitor the unhedged foreign currency exposure (ucfe) of entities and maintain adequate provisioning / capital for the same, as per the ins
controls.control_description:
A bank shall assess and monitor the Unhedged Foreign Currency Exposure
(UCFE) of entities and maintain adequate provisioning / capital for the same, as
per the instructions provided in this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess and monitor the unhedged foreign currency exposure (ucfe) of entities and maintain adequate provisioning / capital for the same, as per the ins

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain the foreign currency exposure (fce) of all entities at least on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
Computation of UFCE
(1) A bank shall ascertain the Foreign Currency Exposure (FCE) of all entities at
least on an annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ascertain the foreign currency exposure (fce) of all entities at least on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute the fce following the relevant accounting standard applicable for the entity
controls.control_description:
A bank shall compute the FCE following the relevant
accounting standard applicable for the entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute the fce following the relevant accounting standard applicable for the entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account
controls.control_description:
Explanation:
Note: For arriving at the foreign currency exposure of entities, their exposure from
all sources including foreign currency borrowings and External Commercial
Borrowings shall be taken into account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the unhedged foreign currency exposure (ufce) of entities with fce by obtaining information on ufce from the concerned entity
controls.control_description:
(2) A bank shall assess the Unhedged Foreign Currency Exposure (UFCE) of
entities with FCE by obtaining information on UFCE from the concerned entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess the unhedged foreign currency exposure (ufce) of entities with fce by obtaining information on ufce from the concerned entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained from entities on a quarterly basis based on statutory audit, internal audit, or self-declaration by the concerned entity
controls.control_description:
Provided that the information on UFCE shall be obtained from entities on a
quarterly basis based on statutory audit, internal audit, or self-declaration by the
concerned entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from entities on a quarterly basis based on statutory audit, internal audit, or self-declaration by the concerned entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be audited and certified by the statutory auditors of the entity, at least on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
Provided further that UFCE information shall be audited and certified by the
statutory auditors of the entity, at least on an annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be audited and certified by the statutory auditors of the entity, at least on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the data published by fedai on largest annual volatility of usd-inr rate over a period of last 10 years and the same shall be used for computation
controls.control_description:
Explanation: A bank shall use the data published by FEDAI on largest annual
volatility of USD-INR rate over a period of last 10 years and the same shall be
used for computation of potential loss by multiplying it with UFCE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the data published by fedai on largest annual volatility of usd-inr rate over a period of last 10 years and the same shall be used for computation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be converted into usd using the current market rates for determining the potential loss from ufce
controls.control_description:
Note: The UFCE in currencies other than USD shall be converted into USD using
the current market rates for determining the potential loss from UFCE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be converted into usd using the current market rates for determining the potential loss from ufce

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine the susceptibility of the entity to adverse exchange rate movements by computing the ratio of the potential loss to entity from ufce and the
controls.control_description:
(2) A bank shall determine the susceptibility of the entity to adverse exchange rate
movements by computing the ratio of the potential loss to entity from UFCE and
the entity's EBID over the last four quarters as per the latest quarterly results
certified by the statutory auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine the susceptibility of the entity to adverse exchange rate movements by computing the ratio of the potential loss to entity from ufce and the

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to use data pertaining to the immediately preceding last four quarters for computing capital and provisioning requirements
controls.control_description:
Note: (i) In cases where a bank is not in a position to obtain information on UFCE
or EBID from listed entities for the latest quarter due to restrictions on disclosure
of such information prior to finalisation of accounts, the bank shall have the option
to use data pertaining to the immediately preceding last four quarters for
computing capital and provisioning requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to use data pertaining to the immediately preceding last four quarters for computing capital and provisioning requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the total exposure amount which is used for computing standard asset provisioning and the incremental capital requirements for ufce shall
controls.control_description:
Table 1: Incremental Provisioning and Capital Requirements for UFCE
Incremental Provisioning Requirement (basis
Potential Loss / EBID
Incremental Capital

Requirement
points)

Note: The incremental provisioning for UFCE shall be based on the total exposure

amount which is used for computing credit risk capital requirements.

controls.control_objective: To ensure calculate the incremental provisioning and capital requirements note: a banks shall put in place a system for information sharing and dissemination in
controls.control_description:
(4) A bank shall calculate the incremental provisioning and capital requirements
Note: A banks shall put in place a system for information sharing and
dissemination in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Transfer
and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to calculate the incremental provisioning and capital requirements note: a banks shall put in place a system for information sharing and dissemination in

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to exclude the following exposures from the calculation of ufce: (1) exposures to entities classified as sovereign, banks, and individ
controls.control_description:
Exemption / Relaxation
A bank shall have the option to exclude the following exposures from the
calculation of UFCE:
(1) Exposures to entities classified as sovereign, banks, and individuals;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to exclude the following exposures from the calculation of ufce: (1) exposures to entities classified as sovereign, banks, and individ

controls.control_objective: To ensure include domestic and foreign sovereign as provided in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, 'sovereign' shall include domestic and foreign sovereign
as provided in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include domestic and foreign sovereign as provided in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be considered as 'bank'
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the RBI regulated Financial Institutions, Bank of
International Settlement (BIS), International Monetary Fund (IMF) and
eligible Multilateral Development Banks (MDBs) listed in Reserve Bank of
India (Commercial Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)
Directions, 2025 shall also be considered as 'bank'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be considered as 'bank'

controls.control_objective: To ensure the bank is satisfied that such foreign currency exposures are appropriately hedged or managed robustly by the parent
controls.control_description:
and
Provided that the bank is satisfied that such foreign currency exposures are
appropriately hedged or managed robustly by the parent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the bank is satisfied that such foreign currency exposures are appropriately hedged or managed robustly by the parent

controls.control_objective: To ensure have borrowed from its parent
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For example, an Indian subsidiary of an MNC incorporated outside
India may have borrowed from its parent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have borrowed from its parent

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute the largest annual volatility over a period of last 10 years in the following manner: first, daily changes in the foreign exchange rates shall
controls.control_description:
(4) Exposures arising from derivative transactions and / or factoring transactions
Note: A bank shall compute the largest annual volatility over a period of last 10
years in the following manner: First, daily changes in the foreign exchange rates
shall be computed as a log return of today's rate over the previous day's rate.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed as standard deviation of these returns over a period of one year (250 observations)
controls.control_description:
Second, daily volatility shall be computed as standard deviation of these returns
over a period of one year (250 observations).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed as standard deviation of these returns over a period of one year (250 observations)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be annualised by multiplying it by square root of 250
controls.control_description:
Third, this daily volatility shall be
annualised by multiplying it by square root of 250.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be annualised by multiplying it by square root of 250

controls.control_objective: To ensure be performed on a daily basis for all the days in the last 10 years
controls.control_description:
This computation shall be
performed on a daily basis for all the days in the last 10 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be performed on a daily basis for all the days in the last 10 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for the computation of the potential loss by multiplying it with the ufce
controls.control_description:
The largest annual
volatility thus computed shall be used for the computation of the potential loss by
multiplying it with the UFCE.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for the computation of the potential loss by multiplying it with the ufce

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of ₹ 5 crore and above from banks (scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural b
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of ₹ 5
crore and above from banks (Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding Regional
Rural Banks), Local Area Banks, Small Finance Banks, and Primary (Urban) Co-
operative Banks) and Financial Institutions (All India Financial Institutions and
NBFCs (including HFCs)) obtain LEI codes
Explanation: 'Exposure' for this purpose shall include all fund based and non-fund
based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of ₹ 5 crore and above from banks (scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Aggregate sanctioned limit or outstanding balance, whichever is higher, shall be
reckoned for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain the position of aggregate exposure based on information available either with them, or central repository of information on large credits (c
controls.control_description:
Lenders shall ascertain the position of aggregate
exposure based on information available either with them, or Central Repository of
Information on Large Credits (CRILC) database or declaration obtained from the
borrower
26.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ascertain the position of aggregate exposure based on information available either with them, or central repository of information on large credits (c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who fail to obtain LEI codes from an authorised Local Operating Unit
(LOU) shall not be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal
/ enhancement of any existing exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from this provision
controls.control_description:
However, Departments / Agencies of
Central and State Governments (not Public Sector Undertakings registered under
Companies Act or established as Corporation under the relevant statute) shall be
exempted from this provision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from this provision

controls.control_objective: To ensure encourage large borrowers to obtain lei for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates
controls.control_description:
A bank shall encourage large borrowers to obtain LEI for their parent entity as well as
all subsidiaries and associates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to encourage large borrowers to obtain lei for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description: In India, LEI code may be obtained
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on
valuation of properties and appointment of valuers.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures
controls.control_description:
Policy for valuation of properties
(1) A bank shall have a Board approved policy in place for valuation of properties
including collaterals accepted for their exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i
controls.control_description:
(2) The valuation shall be done by professionally qualified independent valuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a direct or indirect interest
controls.control_description: the valuer shall not have a direct or indirect interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a direct or indirect interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above
controls.control_description:
(3) A bank shall obtain minimum two Independent Valuation Reports for properties
valued at ₹50 crore or above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) as banks are permitted to include revaluation
controls.control_description:
Revaluation of bank's own properties: In addition to the above, a bank may keep the
following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own
properties:
(1) As banks are permitted to include revaluation reserves as part of Capital in terms
of Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025, it is necessary that revaluation reserves represent
true appreciation in the market value of the properties and banks have in place a
comprehensive policy for revaluation of fixed assets owned by them.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) as banks are permitted to include revaluation

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva
controls.control_description:
Such a
policy shall inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation,
maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of
revaluation, depreciation policy for such assets, policy for sale of such revalued
assets etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva

controls.control_objective: To ensure also cover the disclosure required to be made in the 'notes on account' regarding the details of revaluation such as the original cost of the fixed as
controls.control_description:
The policy shall also cover the disclosure required to be made in the
'Notes on Account' regarding the details of revaluation such as the original cost
of the fixed assets subject to revaluation and accounting treatment for
appreciation / depreciation etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also cover the disclosure required to be made in the 'notes on account' regarding the details of revaluation such as the original cost of the fixed as

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric
controls.control_description:
(2) As the revaluation shall reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the
frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in
the prices of the assets in the past.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of <image> the future economic benefits of the assets
controls.control_description:
Further, any change in the method of
depreciation shall reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of
<image>
the future economic benefits of the assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of <image> the future economic benefits of the assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of asset and shall
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to these principles
meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation
for a particular class of asset and shall make proper disclosures in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of asset and shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'
controls.control_description:
Policy for Empanelment of Independent valuers
(1) A bank shall have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and
maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'.

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers
controls.control_description: (2) A bank may prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for different classes of assets (e
controls.control_description: Different qualifications may be prescribed for different classes of assets (e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for different classes of assets (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957
controls.control_description:
While prescribing the
qualification, the bank shall take into consideration the qualifications prescribed
under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also be guided by the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available for search by any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property
controls.control_description:
The records maintained by the Central Registry shall be available for search by
any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available for search by any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the registry
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that under the provisions of
Section 23 of the SARFAESI Act, every transaction of security interest is required
to be filed with the Registry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the registry

controls.control_objective: To ensure all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders
controls.control_description:
Current Accounts, Cash Credit Accounts (CC), and Overdraft Accounts (OD) may
all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating
to credit monitoring by the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative
controls.control_description:
Explanation (1): 'Banking System' for the purpose of this Chapter shall include
Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional
Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative Banks and Rural
Co-operative Banks (State Co-operative Banks and Central Co-operative Banks).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative

controls.control_objective: To ensure the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system
controls.control_description:
Explanation (2): 'Exposure' for the purpose of this Chapter means the sum of all
sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the
borrower from the banking system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system

controls.control_objective: To ensure a current account or od account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the accountholder
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'Collection Account' for the purpose of this Chapter means a current
account or OD account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the
accountholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a current account or od account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the accountholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 38f of these directions
controls.control_description:
Restricted payments / cash outflows from such account shall be
subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 38F of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 38f of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure include additional covenants as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers
controls.control_description:
With a view to ensuring credit discipline, lenders may include additional covenants
as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include additional covenants as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter
controls.control_description:
A bank may provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the
customer, without any restriction under this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain current account or od account without any restriction in case of borrowers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer
controls.control_description:
A bank may maintain current account or OD account without any restriction in case
of borrowers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is
less than ₹10 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain current account or od account without any restriction in case of borrowers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s
controls.control_description:
Funds credited into a collection account shall be remitted within two working days
of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained
with any bank in the banking system and designated by the borrower for this purpose
<image>
(hereinafter referred to as 'designated account' in this Chapter).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through the designated account only
controls.control_description:
Any disbursement of
overdraft limit from an OD account, which is in the nature of a collection account, shall
be through the designated account only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through the designated account only

controls.control_objective: To ensure statutory dues such as taxes, and dues
controls.control_description:
Provided that statutory dues such as taxes, and dues, if any, to the bank maintaining
the collection account may be debited before remitting the funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to statutory dues such as taxes, and dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat
controls.control_description:
The restrictions placed in terms of paragraph 38D(1) of these Directions shall not
be applicable to the accounts mentioned below:
(1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (FEMA) and notifications issued thereunder, including accounts mandated
for ensuring compliance under the FEMA framework.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes
controls.control_description:
Provided that banks operating the above-mentioned exempted accounts shall
ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted /
specified purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted to the designated account
controls.control_description:
Surplus funds, if any, in such accounts shall be remitted to
the designated account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted to the designated account

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of ensuring ongoing compliance with this Chapter, all banks shall
monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least
once every half-year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year

controls.control_objective: To ensure notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe
controls.control_description:
then the bank shall notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within
one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must either
be converted to a collection account or closed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility
controls.control_description:
The conversion or closure process, as
the case may be, shall be completed within three months of observing such
ineligibility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Accounts opened in terms of these Directions shall be appropriately flagged in the
bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate
effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level
controls.control_description:
Banks maintaining multiple accounts for a borrower shall ensure
that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the
borrower level as also at the account level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for
transactions related to their authorised business or activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions
controls.control_description:
These accounts shall
not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third-
party transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so
controls.control_description:
Provided that entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator
to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope
controls.control_description:
However, such activities
shall strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall
not extend beyond that scope.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Any account that has been permitted to carry out such
third-party transactions shall be appropriately flagged in the bank's CBS to ensure
clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by
the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage
in such activities through accounts maintained with them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas
controls.control_description:
Robust monitoring systems shall be implemented to detect the above prohibited
usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction
volumes, frequent pass-through activities, or inconsistencies between the
accountholder's stated line of business and transactions carried out through the
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use
controls.control_description:
Term loans sanctioned by the bank shall preferably be remitted directly to the
intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use, where such beneficiary
is identifiable, rather than routing the funds through the borrower's account.]
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure reduce their capacity to service the loans taken from the banking system and increase their probability of default thereby affecting the health of the
controls.control_description:
These losses may reduce their
capacity to service the loans taken from the banking system and increase their
probability of default thereby affecting the health of the banking system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reduce their capacity to service the loans taken from the banking system and increase their probability of default thereby affecting the health of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure price the risk from unhedged foreign currency exposure (ufce) as credit risk premium which may nudge entities to hedge their foreign currency exposure
controls.control_description:
The aim of the framework was that the banks shall price the risk from Unhedged
Foreign Currency Exposure (UFCE) as credit risk premium which may nudge entities
to hedge their foreign currency exposures in the market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to price the risk from unhedged foreign currency exposure (ufce) as credit risk premium which may nudge entities to hedge their foreign currency exposure
